notes: HAR-262 captured Shopify Admin GraphQL 2026-04 BulkOperation reads, list empty filters, deprecated currentBulkOperation behavior, bulkOperationRunQuery validation, unknown-id cancel userErrors, terminal cancel userErrors, and safe query export status transitions.
